channel.title: Eddy Cue on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Eddy Cue on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Eddy Cue Honored
item.description: Eddy Cue recognized as 2026 Entertainment Person of the Year at Cannes Lions for Apple TV work

item.title: Eddy Cue Cannes
item.description: Eddy Cue accepts entertainment person of the year award at Cannes Lions, a prestigious event.

item.title: Apple TV’s Original Vision: Steve Jobs’ Legacy Lives On
item.description: Eddy Cue reveals how Steve Jobs’ ethos shaped Apple TV’s strategy, rejecting library buys for original content. A deep dive into Apple’s vision.
